title: delphinium elatum subsp. pubicaule
intro: Delphinium elatum subsp. pubicaule, also known as the tall delphinium or purple delphinium, is a perennial plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its root and seeds are said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Delphinium elatum subsp. pubicaule include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as potential antitumor and antibacterial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the root and seeds for use in teas, tinctures, and infusions.
